terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to TechBridge. By using our website and services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.

sections.title: 1. Subscription Model
sections.content: TechBridge provides Hardware as a Service (HaaS). Our products are provided on a subscription basis and remain the property of TechBridge unless otherwise stated in a separate purchase agreement.

sections.title: 2. Hardware Responsibility
sections.content: Subscribers are responsible for the basic care of the hardware. While we provide a 4-hour replacement guarantee for technical failures, intentional damage or gross negligence may result in repair fees.

sections.title: 3. Payment & Billing
sections.content: Subscription fees are billed monthly in advance. Failure to pay within the grace period may result in service suspension and hardware retrieval.

sections.title: 4. Service Guarantee
sections.content: Our 4-hour replacement guarantee applies to Greater Cairo during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM, Sunday to Thursday). Outside these hours, replacements will be prioritized for the next business day.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At TechBridge, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your business information.

sections.title: 1. Information Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide via our contact forms, including name, company name, email, and phone number, to provide custom hardware proposals.

sections.title: 2. Data Usage
sections.content: Your data is used solely to manage your inquiries, provide technical support, and improve our subscription services. We do not sell your data to third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access or disclosure.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic.
